name: 9D Breathwork
whyTarget: Their ENTIRE product IS produced audio journeys. Facilitators license pre-made tracks. Fastest-growing breathwork cert org. Essentially a music-tech company.
notes: Direct competitor risk OR partnership goldmine. Their facilitators already pay to license audio. SessionCraft could supply the music layer.

contacts.whyReachOut: Active facilitators tagging 9D content — warm audience already sold on the method

name: SOMA Breath
whyTarget: Founder has music production background. Method REQUIRES music. Massive instructor network. Mindvalley partnership.
notes: Niraj produces music himself — approach as enhancement/variety for his instructor network, not replacement.

contacts.name: TBC — search #somabreath instructors
contacts.whyReachOut: Instructors already evangelize the method publicly — natural fit for music tool

contacts.name: TBC — search #somabreath instructors
contacts.whyReachOut: Instructors already evangelize the method publicly — natural fit for music tool

name: Neurodynamic Breathwork
whyTarget: Every session is a 2-hour curated musical journey. Sessions run 2-3x/week online. Music IS the method.
notes: Online-first model = scalable. High music consumption per session (2 hours). Perfect SessionCraft fit.

name: Wisdom Healing Qigong / Chi Center
whyTarget: Sound/vibration is the CORE of Mingtong's method. Toning + chanting + music = fundamental practice tools. Most natural qigong fit.
notes: TOP qigong target. Sound IS the practice. Partnership = official music platform for WHQ practitioners.

name: Insight Timer
whyTarget: Craig already has 800 followers here. Largest free meditation app. 25M+ downloads. Music licensing for guided meditation creators is huge.
notes: WARMEST CHANNEL. Craig's existing audience. Could post to teacher community or explore platform partnership.

name: Ecstatic Dance Networks
whyTarget: Music IS the entire modality. Every event = 2-hour curated musical journey. Massive global community.
notes: Every facilitator is a music consumer by definition. Licensing for ecstatic dance events is a massive untapped market.

name: Holotropic Breathwork / GTT
whyTarget: The OG. Music is formally 1 of 3 foundational pillars. Gold-standard training. Every facilitator needs music for every session.
notes: Legacy market. Premium pricing acceptable. Facilitators trained in music curation as core skill.

name: Alchemy of Breath
whyTarget: Breathwork DJ culture. International retreat circuit. Music is central to journey experience.
notes: Strong music culture. DJ identity = they value music quality highly.

contacts.name: Anthony Abbagnano
contacts.whyReachOut: Founder has DJ identity — music-first culture. More reachable than bigger orgs.

contacts.name: TBC — search #alchemyofbreath facilitators
contacts.whyReachOut: Retreat-circuit facilitators. Music taste = high. Would immediately see value.

name: Breath of Bliss
whyTarget: Ecstatic breathwork with DJ collabs and festival circuit. Music + movement + sounding.
notes: Festival/ecstatic dance crossover. Natural music licensing fit.

contacts.name: Christabel Zamor
contacts.whyReachOut: Festival circuit. Active IG. Ecstatic breathwork = music is everything.

contacts.name: TBC — search #breathofbliss facilitators
contacts.whyReachOut: Facilitators active in festival/ecstatic scene — music-obsessed audience

name: Kundalini Research Institute (KRI)
whyTarget: Kirtan + mantra + gong + naad yoga in EVERY class. Music is doctrinally required in Kundalini.
notes: Every Kundalini teacher uses music in every session. Non-negotiable part of the tradition.

name: Spirit Voyage
whyTarget: THE music label for Kundalini yoga. Could be content partner or co-marketing.
notes: Potential PARTNER not just customer. They solve 'what music do teachers use' — SessionCraft solves 'how do teachers USE music in sessions.'

name: Sounds True
whyTarget: IS a music label + publisher in this space. 2000+ titles. Hosts Brach/Kornfield MTT (2000+ grads). Partner or competitor.
notes: Strategic: could be distribution partner for Craig's music AND channel to their teacher network.

name: Dr. Joe Dispenza / Encephalon
whyTarget: Already licensed Craig's music. Walking meditations use curated music. DJ-led dance sessions at retreats. Events of 2000-5000.
notes: WARMEST B2B CONNECTION. Expand from one licensed track to ongoing platform relationship. Trainers run local groups worldwide.

name: Tai Chi for Health Institute
whyTarget: BY FAR the largest instructor network. CDC/WHO endorsed. Medical/institutional = compliance-conscious = willing to pay.
notes: VOLUME KING. Even 1% adoption = 200 practitioners.

name: Keith's Cacao
whyTarget: Every cacao ceremony uses music. 500+ certified facilitators in 40+ countries.
notes: Every facilitator runs music-heavy ceremonies. Direct B2B opportunity.

name: Lee Holden QiGong
whyTarget: PBS host. 300K+ YouTube subs. Music-forward classes. Partnership cascades to entire teacher network.
notes: Approach as 'preferred music provider for Holden QiGong certified teachers.'

name: Spring Forest Qigong
whyTarget: Already sells branded practice music. Understands the music value proposition.
notes: They already produce/sell their own music. Approach as supplemental/ambient options or white-label partnership.

name: Art of Living Foundation
whyTarget: Specific music used in Sudarshan Kriya. 40000+ teachers in 180 countries.
notes: Massive but bureaucratic. If you get in, the scale is unmatched.

name: HeartMath Institute
whyTarget: Guided audio in sessions. Biofeedback tech + music licensing synergy. Used in 100+ hospitals.
notes: Institutional/clinical angle. Tech+music crossover.

name: BioDynamic Breathwork (BBTRS)
whyTarget: Sound/music is explicitly 1 of 6 core therapeutic elements.
notes: Music formally part of their system.

name: Pause Breathwork
whyTarget: Fast-growing. Strong social media. Music used in sessions.
notes: Growing quickly. Strong marketing = responsive to partnership opportunities.

contacts.name: Samantha Skelly
contacts.whyReachOut: Founder IS active on IG and responds. Growing brand. Partnership-minded.

contacts.name: TBC — search #pausebreathwork facilitators
contacts.whyReachOut: Mid-level certified instructors — highly reachable, music-forward sessions

name: Chopra Global
whyTarget: 3000+ certified instructors. 21-Day Meditation Experience reaches 20M+ people.
notes: Massive brand. 21-Day Meditation = huge music licensing opportunity.

name: Wanderlust
whyTarget: Pioneered yoga+music festival format. DJ-yoga sets. Sound healing stages. Music is half the brand.
notes: Partnership/event sponsorship opportunity.

name: Kripalu Center
whyTarget: Largest yoga retreat center in North America. 40000+ annual guests. Kirtan + sound healing.
notes: Large certified teacher network. Venue + teacher training combined.

name: Globe Institute of Sound Healing
whyTarget: Every graduate is a sound practitioner who needs licensed music/sounds for sessions.
notes: Direct pipeline of practitioners who need music tools.

name: Universal Healing Tao
whyTarget: Largest single qigong teacher network globally. Decentralized. 40+ year history.
notes: Volume play. Even 10% adoption across 2000+ instructors is significant.

name: Transformational Breath Foundation
whyTarget: Huge legacy network but music is supportive rather than central.
notes: Large network. Music secondary but still used.

name: David Elliott Breathwork
whyTarget: Celebrity clientele (Diplo etc.). Influential LA wellness scene.
notes: Influencer/celebrity adjacent. Good for brand awareness.

name: Mindvalley
whyTarget: 20M+ students. $100M+ revenue. Events feature DJ sets. Massive platform.
notes: Massive platform but complex partnership. Events are music-heavy.

name: Omega Institute
whyTarget: 23000+ annual participants. Strong music programming. 50+ years.
notes: Major hub for transformational teachers. Venue partner opportunity.

name: iRest Institute
whyTarget: Yoga Nidra with sound elements. Used in 50+ VA hospitals. Clinical credibility.
notes: Clinical/institutional channel. Large certified network.

name: McLean Meditation Institute
whyTarget: Every graduate teaches meditation classes that often use music.
notes: Established MTT program. Graduates need music for classes.

name: Tara Brach / Jack Kornfield MTT
whyTarget: Most popular Buddhist meditation teachers in the West. Hosted through Sounds True.
notes: Connected to Sounds True. Strong network effect.

name: davidji
whyTarget: Growing teacher certification. Every graduate teaches with music. Affordable entry.
notes: Growing MTT network. Strong personal brand.

name: Supreme Science Qigong
whyTarget: Known for massive live events (1000+ attendees). High-energy. Music used in production.
notes: Event-based model = music is a production expense they already budget for.

name: IIQTC
whyTarget: Evidence-based. Teachers work in medical/clinical settings. Licensed music = compliance need.
notes: Medical/institutional angle. Compliance-conscious market.

name: The Satori Method
whyTarget: I have an ongoing relationship with Tristan and and Sabrina at the Satori method and they have been using my music for the last two years or so without paying
notes: I need to get back to Tristan in a hurry
